title: EXTRACT output — entities E*, explicit/implied requirements R*, constraints C*, unknowns U*

request_ref.description: path to raw request file; feature-add: path to CR file

baseline_map_ref.description: feature-add: path to baseline-map.json; null for greenfield

entities.description: named domain entities; E* space, feature-add strictly above baseline high-water

id.description: stable entity id; E* never renumbered

name.description: entity name as used in the domain

inferred.description: true only if request forces entity but never names it; rationale required when true

rationale.description: required when inferred:true; why a competent builder cannot omit this entity

source.description: words in the request that introduce this entity

sr_ref.description: subrequest id this entity belongs to

baseline_ref.description: feature-add: baseline E* this extends or null for net-new; omit for greenfield

explicit_requirements.description: inferred:false for all; R* numbered first

id.description: stable requirement id; R* never renumbered

text.description: single atomic behavior stated in the request

source.description: verbatim span from the request proving this requirement exists

sr_ref.description: subrequest id this requirement traces to

baseline_ref.description: feature-add: baseline R* this extends or null for net-new

implied_requirements.description: inferred:true for all; continues R* space after explicit

id.description: stable requirement id; continues R* sequence after explicit requirements

text.description: single atomic behavior necessarily entailed by explicit requirements

source.description: the explicit words or requirement that entails this one

rationale.description: why a competent builder cannot avoid this — required on every implied item

sr_ref.description: subrequest id this requirement traces to

baseline_ref.description: feature-add: baseline R* this extends or null for net-new

stated_constraints.description: platform, stack, scale, compliance, timeline, or budget constraints from the request

id.description: stable constraint id; C* never renumbered

inferred.description: true if forced-but-unnamed in request; rationale required when true

source.description: words in the request that establish this constraint

sr_ref.description: subrequest id this constraint traces to

baseline_ref.description: feature-add: baseline C* this extends or null for net-new

unknowns.description: facts a builder needs that neither request nor baseline answers

id.description: stable unknown id; U* never renumbered

text.description: fact a builder needs that neither request nor baseline answers

source.description: words in the request that raise this question

sr_ref.description: subrequest id this unknown belongs to
